scope.summary: The rig L2 lane vendors MIT HR/CO/SH sample schemas at a pinned upstream commit and loads them with a synthetic governance overlay on Free23 and XE21.
out_of_scope: Bulk SH CSV data; the committed lane intentionally loads SH structure-only.
A data-volume benchmark lane over SH rows.
Loading CO on XE18; the default live L2 proof covers Free23 and XE21.
Any field-test or customer-derived schema, identifier, wallet, or data.

entry_points.name: bash scripts/rig/verify_sample_schemas.sh
entry_points.trace: Passed on 2026-07-22: 19 files matched the pinned upstream commit, the MIT licence was present, and no unvetted additions were present.

entry_points.name: bash scripts/rig/verify_sample_schemas.sh --selftest
entry_points.trace: Passed on 2026-07-22: drift, unvetted additions, missing licence, and missing manifest files were all refused; a clean tree passed.

entry_points.name: bash scripts/rig/oracle_l2_sample_schemas.sh run --log
entry_points.trace: Passed on 2026-07-22 against synthetic local lanes free23 and xe21. For both lanes, HR, CO, SH structure-only, and the governance overlay loaded successfully, and l2_object_assert verified HR/CO/SH/governance objects.

entry_points.name: bash -n scripts/rig/oracle_l2_sample_schemas.sh scripts/rig/verify_sample_schemas.sh
entry_points.trace: Passed on 2026-07-22; both L2 shell entrypoints parse.

limitations: The live L2 proof uses only synthetic local lab containers rust-oracledb-free/FREEPDB1 and oracle-xe21-1520/XEPDB1.
SH is structure-only by design because the large upstream CSV data files are not committed.
The full workspace gate was not run because this shared checkout has unrelated in-flight panes.
